description_long: This coupe car features a compact, sporty body with a sloping roofline and a two-door configuration, reminiscent of classic 1980s Japanese sports cars. The exterior is predominantly white with black accents, including the window trim, side mirrors, and a distinctive black stripe running along the lower body. The front end is characterized by pop-up headlights, a low-profile hood, and a subtle front bumper. The side profile reveals flared wheel arches, aerodynamic side mirrors, and a slightly raised rear spoiler. The rear view shows a wide, flat trunk with a black rear bumper and rectangular taillights, as well as a visible license plate area. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels are multi-spoke with a clean, simple design.
description: A white, two-door coupe car with black accents, pop-up headlights, and a sporty, sloped roofline. Features include tinted windows, a rear spoiler, and classic 1980s styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing pop-up headlights, a low hood, and black side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, black side stripe, and flared wheel arches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat trunk, rear spoiler, rectangular taillights, and license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe silhouette, black accents, and wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
